columns.extraction_plan: The document mentions 'Eastern Cooperative Oncology Group performance status (0 to 1 v 2)' as a stratification factor on page 3 in the 'Procedures' section. However, the number and percentage of patients with PS 0 in the treatment arm are not reported in any tables or text within the PDF. Page 4 states 'Treatment groups were well balanced, as previously described', suggesting baseline characteristics were reported elsewhere.
